stemHtml: What is the function of pulse P2 in mode A/C interrogation?

options.a: To avoid “fruiting” if an aircraft is interrogated by more than one SSR interrogator at the same time.
options.b: To avoid code garbling if two aircraft are located in the same direction (as seen from the interrogator) and at a distance of less than approximately 1.7 NM apart.
options.c: To avoid responses from aircraft that are located in the direction of the side lobes of the interrogator antenna.
